_comment: 역할별 MD 삽화 + 추가 UI 이미지. taisho_roman 스타일 전용.

role_illustrations.prefix: Taisho Roman era Japanese illustration, wide scene, ukiyo-e influenced, muted vintage tones with gold accents, dramatic composition,
role_illustrations.suffix: , vintage lithograph texture, elegant Japanese retro art, masterpiece, best quality

rules_illustrations.prefix: Taisho Roman era Japanese illustration, wide scene, ukiyo-e influenced, muted vintage tones with gold accents, instructional diagram style,
rules_illustrations.suffix: , vintage lithograph texture, elegant Japanese retro art, masterpiece, best quality

ui_extra.prefix: Taisho Roman era Japanese decorative design, art nouveau ornamental, vintage print aesthetic,
ui_extra.suffix: , Japanese retro design, gold leaf accent, lithograph texture, masterpiece

role_illustrations.description: 역할별 MD 삽화. 각 역할의 능력/전략/상황을 묘사하는 와이드 일러스트.

werewolf_hunt.caption: 동족 확인
werewolf_hunt.prompt: two dark wolves in human clothing secretly exchanging glances across a moonlit village square, other villagers unaware, tension and conspiracy, night scene with silver moonlight

werewolf_lone.caption: 외로운 늑대
werewolf_lone.prompt: a lone werewolf figure peeking at face-down cards on a stone table in a dark room, candlelight revealing claws, solitary and calculating atmosphere

werewolf_accused.caption: 투표 재판
werewolf_accused.prompt: an accused figure standing in a medieval village tribunal circle, angry mob pointing fingers, torches and dramatic shadows, tension of judgment

seer_vision.caption: 예언 능력
seer_vision.prompt: a mystical fortune teller gazing into a crystal ball revealing a wolf silhouette, magical swirling energy, cosmic purple and blue glow, revelation moment

seer_choice.caption: 선택의 순간
seer_choice.prompt: a hand hovering between two face-down cards and a single player card, decision moment, mystical energy flowing from fingertips, strategic dilemma

seer_testimony.caption: 증언
seer_testimony.prompt: a robed seer standing before seated villagers sharing visions, gesturing dramatically, some believing some doubting, daylight courtyard scene

robber_swap.caption: 카드 교환
robber_swap.prompt: a masked thief silently swapping two cards under moonlight, nimble hands mid-exchange, sleeping village background, stealth and precision

robber_identity.caption: 새 정체 확인
robber_identity.prompt: a thief looking at a stolen card with shock and realization, the card glowing with wolf or village symbol, dramatic reveal moment

robber_bluff.caption: 위장
robber_bluff.prompt: a figure in shadows removing their mask to reveal a different face beneath, identity crisis, duality of roles, mirror reflection showing wolf

minion_devotion.caption: 충성의 맹세
minion_devotion.prompt: a hooded cultist kneeling before wolf shadows on a wall, thumbs up signal in darkness, secret allegiance ritual, candlelit cellar

minion_sacrifice.caption: 희생 전략
minion_sacrifice.prompt: a figure deliberately drawing suspicion onto themselves while wolves hide in the crowd, martyrdom pose, village square at dawn

minion_deception.caption: 교란
minion_deception.prompt: a puppet master figure secretly pulling strings that connect villagers, creating confusion and misdirection, web of lies visualization

mason_bond.caption: 결사 확인
mason_bond.prompt: two mason figures exchanging secret handshakes in a moonlit masonic temple, pillars and compass symbols, trust and brotherhood, blue and gold

mason_alibi.caption: 알리바이
mason_alibi.prompt: two allies standing back to back in a village debate, defending each other, mutual trust shield visualization, daylight scene

mason_suspicion.caption: 의심받는 결사
mason_suspicion.prompt: villagers suspiciously watching two players who seem too coordinated, paranoid atmosphere, whispers and sidelong glances

troublemaker_chaos.caption: 혼란의 교환
troublemaker_chaos.prompt: a jester figure juggling two glowing cards between two sleeping players, chaotic magical sparks, mischievous grin, midnight chaos

troublemaker_confusion.caption: 아침의 혼란
troublemaker_confusion.prompt: villagers arguing and pointing at each other in confusion at dawn, identity mix-up chaos, scattered cards, comedic pandemonium

troublemaker_reveal.caption: 진실 공개
troublemaker_reveal.prompt: the moment of revelation when swapped players discover their new roles, shock and disbelief expressions, dramatic gasps

tanner_despair.caption: 절망의 무두장이
tanner_despair.prompt: a weary tanner sitting alone in a dark leather workshop surrounded by hanging pelts, hollow hopeless eyes, desiring death as escape

tanner_provocation.caption: 도발
tanner_provocation.prompt: a tanner deliberately acting suspicious in the village square, waving arms and making contradictory claims, wanting to be voted out

tanner_victory.caption: 역설의 승리
tanner_victory.prompt: a ghostly tanner figure rising victorious from a grave while confused wolves and villagers watch in disbelief, ironic triumph, dark humor

drunk_stumble.caption: 무의식의 교환
drunk_stumble.prompt: a drunk stumbling figure blindly swapping their card with a center pile card, dizzy stars, unable to see what they got, tavern haziness

drunk_morning.caption: 아침의 혼란
drunk_morning.prompt: a hungover figure at dawn trying to remember what happened last night, blurry vision, headache visualization, identity uncertainty

drunk_accusation.caption: 억울한 누명
drunk_accusation.prompt: a confused drunk being accused by villagers while genuinely not knowing their own role, hands up in bewilderment, village trial

hunter_revenge.caption: 최후의 복수
hunter_revenge.prompt: a fallen hunter firing a crossbow bolt at their accuser in their dying moment, dramatic final shot, vengeance and justice, sunset battlefield

hunter_dilemma.caption: 투표의 딜레마
hunter_dilemma.prompt: a hunter carefully considering who to point their crossbow at during a vote, weighing life and death decision, tense standoff

hunter_bluff.caption: 사냥꾼의 억지력
hunter_bluff.prompt: a hunter publicly displaying their crossbow as deterrent, nobody wants to vote for them, standoff atmosphere, power of threat

insomniac_watch.caption: 마지막 확인
insomniac_watch.prompt: a sleepless figure peeking at their own card at the end of a long night, candle flickering, wide alert eyes discovering truth, bedroom scene

insomniac_changed.caption: 바뀐 정체
insomniac_changed.prompt: an insomniac seeing a different card than expected, shock and horror or relief, the card glowing with unexpected symbol, dramatic revelation

insomniac_testimony.caption: 확실한 증언
insomniac_testimony.prompt: an insomniac confidently testifying to villagers about their unchanged or changed identity, certainty and conviction, courtyard scene

doppelganger_mirror.caption: 복제의 순간
doppelganger_mirror.prompt: a figure looking into a cracked mirror seeing another person's reflection, identity theft moment, silver and purple shifting energy, metamorphosis

doppelganger_act.caption: 복제된 행동
doppelganger_act.prompt: a shapeshifter performing another role's night action with a ghostly original figure overlaid, dual identity visualization, spectral effect

doppelganger_crisis.caption: 정체성 혼란
doppelganger_crisis.prompt: a figure with two overlapping faces struggling to maintain their facade during village debate, identity crisis, cracking mask

witch_potion.caption: 비약의 선택
witch_potion.prompt: a witch examining a glowing center card then deciding whether to swap it with a player card, bubbling cauldron, strategic decision, green magical smoke

witch_swap.caption: 운명의 교환
witch_swap.prompt: a witch placing a cursed card next to a sleeping villager, dark magical transfer, sinister yet calculated move, moonlit bedroom

witch_innocent.caption: 무고한 마녀
witch_innocent.prompt: a witch choosing not to swap any card, walking away from the cauldron with clean hands, restraint and wisdom, dawn light entering workshop

alpha_wolf_convert.caption: 새 늑대 생성
alpha_wolf_convert.prompt: a massive wolf alpha placing a wolf card next to an unsuspecting sleeping player, dark conversion ritual, predatory shadows, creating new pack member

alpha_wolf_throne.caption: 늑대 우두머리
alpha_wolf_throne.prompt: an alpha wolf on a throne of bones commanding lesser wolves with glowing red eyes, pack hierarchy, dark forest throne room

alpha_wolf_strategy.caption: 전략적 선택
alpha_wolf_strategy.prompt: a wolf studying center cards by moonlight, calculating which card to use for conversion, strategic predator mind, chess-like planning

mystic_wolf_peek.caption: 비밀 엿보기
mystic_wolf_peek.prompt: an ethereal wolf with a third eye secretly viewing a player card, mystical vision, arcane runes floating, knowledge is power, indigo aura

mystic_wolf_info.caption: 정보의 힘
mystic_wolf_info.prompt: a mystic wolf whispering intelligence to pack members during night, shared vision between wolves, strategic information network

mystic_wolf_alibi.caption: 완벽한 알리바이
mystic_wolf_alibi.prompt: a wolf in human disguise using stolen knowledge to craft perfect alibis in daylight debate, confident deception, knowing smirk

dream_wolf_sleep.caption: 잠든 위협
dream_wolf_sleep.prompt: a sleeping wolf dreaming of the hunt while other wolves move around them, peaceful yet dangerous slumber, dreamlike mist, floating moon

dream_wolf_vulnerability.caption: 노출 위험
dream_wolf_vulnerability.prompt: a sleeping wolf figure being investigated by a seer with a magnifying glass, vulnerability of being seen without knowing, dramatic irony

dream_wolf_waking.caption: 각성의 아침
dream_wolf_waking.prompt: a wolf waking up at dawn not knowing who their allies are, alone among villagers, isolated wolf team member, uncertain morning

apprentice_seer_study.caption: 수련생의 예언
apprentice_seer_study.prompt: a young apprentice with a small crystal shard peeking at one center card, limited but valuable vision, student robes, soft purple glow

apprentice_seer_growth.caption: 성장
apprentice_seer_growth.prompt: an apprentice gaining confidence after seeing a center card, small victory smile, stepping into the light of knowledge, coming-of-age moment

apprentice_seer_testimony.caption: 제한된 증언
apprentice_seer_testimony.prompt: an apprentice carefully sharing limited information with skeptical villagers, nervous but truthful testimony, village square

paranormal_investigator_search.caption: 수사 개시
paranormal_investigator_search.prompt: a noir detective with a glowing magnifying glass examining player cards one by one, spectral evidence floating, dark investigation room

paranormal_investigator_convert.caption: 진영 전환
paranormal_investigator_convert.prompt: a detective looking at a wolf card and their eyes changing color to red, horrifying conversion moment, corruption spreading through body

paranormal_investigator_stop.caption: 수사 중단
paranormal_investigator_stop.prompt: a detective deliberately putting down their magnifying glass after seeing one card, choosing not to look further, cautious wisdom

village_idiot_shift.caption: 전체 이동
village_idiot_shift.prompt: a jester figure spinning all player cards in a circle like a merry-go-round, arrows showing rotation direction, chaotic but systematic

village_idiot_chaos.caption: 대혼란의 아침
village_idiot_chaos.prompt: all villagers waking up confused as their positions shifted, everyone pointing in different directions, comedic mass confusion

village_idiot_strategy.caption: 얼간이의 지혜
village_idiot_strategy.prompt: the village idiot sitting quietly with a secret knowing smile while chaos erupts around them, hidden intelligence behind the mask of foolishness

revealer_expose.caption: 공개의 순간
revealer_expose.prompt: an angelic figure dramatically flipping a player card face-up revealing a villager role, divine light beam, public revelation

revealer_cover.caption: 다시 덮기
revealer_cover.prompt: a revealer hastily covering a flipped card back up after seeing a wolf symbol, panic and quick thinking, protective instinct

revealer_impact.caption: 공개의 파장
revealer_impact.prompt: villagers reacting to a publicly revealed role card, some relieved some suspicious, ripple effect of information, village square commotion

aura_seer_sense.caption: 기운 감지
aura_seer_sense.prompt: a meditating figure with closed eyes sensing colorful aura trails left by night actors, energy threads connecting to moved cards, rainbow detection

aura_seer_map.caption: 행동 지도
aura_seer_map.prompt: an aura seer mentally mapping who acted and who stayed still during the night, constellation-like diagram of actions floating in mind

aura_seer_deduction.caption: 추론
aura_seer_deduction.prompt: an aura seer presenting their findings to villagers with glowing connection lines between suspects, analytical deduction scene

prince_immunity.caption: 면역의 왕관
prince_immunity.prompt: a prince figure with a golden crown deflecting votes like a force field, immunity aura, regal defiance against the mob, untouchable

prince_burden.caption: 왕관의 무게
prince_burden.prompt: a young prince bearing the heavy crown with the burden of survival while others fall, lonely at the top, bittersweet immunity

prince_suspicion.caption: 왕자의 의심
prince_suspicion.prompt: villagers suspiciously eyeing the prince who cannot be eliminated, questioning if royalty hides a dark secret, political tension

cursed_transformation.caption: 저주의 발동
cursed_transformation.prompt: a normal villager being viewed by a seer and dark wolf marks suddenly appearing on their skin, unwilling transformation, curse activation

cursed_unaware.caption: 무지의 저주
cursed_unaware.prompt: a cursed figure walking among villagers completely unaware of the dark mark on their back, dramatic irony, hidden danger

cursed_reveal.caption: 진실의 순간
cursed_reveal.prompt: the shocking moment when a cursed villager is revealed to have become a wolf, village gasps, identity betrayal by fate

apprentice_tanner_shadow.caption: 스승의 그림자
apprentice_tanner_shadow.prompt: a young apprentice following in the shadow of the tanner master, learning the trade of despair, dingy workshop, ochre and brown

apprentice_tanner_loyalty.caption: 충성의 대가
apprentice_tanner_loyalty.prompt: an apprentice celebrating when their master tanner is voted out, bittersweet shared victory, tears and relief

apprentice_tanner_alone.caption: 홀로 남은 견습생
apprentice_tanner_alone.prompt: an apprentice tanner alone when the master is not in the game, lost and purposeless, becoming a villager by default, empty workshop

thing_touch.caption: 존재의 터치
thing_touch.prompt: a mysterious shadowy hand reaching out to touch a neighbor's shoulder in the dark, subtle signal, eerie contact, goosebumps moment

thing_signal.caption: 신호의 의미
thing_signal.prompt: two neighbors exchanging knowing glances after being touched in the night, silent communication, subtle alliance formation

thing_mystery.caption: 정체불명
thing_mystery.prompt: villagers debating about a mysterious presence they felt during the night, phantom touch, unsettling uncertainty, paranoid atmosphere

squire_loyalty.caption: 기사의 충성
squire_loyalty.prompt: a young squire in wolf-emblazoned armor kneeling before wolf masters, pledging loyalty, dark castle ceremony, crimson and steel

squire_shield.caption: 방패 역할
squire_shield.prompt: a squire stepping forward to take suspicion and protect the wolves, human shield strategy, selfless sacrifice for the pack

squire_intelligence.caption: 정보 수집
squire_intelligence.prompt: a squire quietly observing wolves during the night phase, memorizing faces and positions, intelligence gathering, shadowy observation

beholder_watch.caption: 주시의 눈
beholder_watch.prompt: multiple floating magical eyes watching over the seer, protective surveillance, deep indigo guardian energy, all-seeing vigil

beholder_protect.caption: 예언자 보호
beholder_protect.prompt: a beholder subtly deflecting suspicion away from the seer during village debate, quiet guardian, strategic protection

beholder_confirm.caption: 확인의 가치
beholder_confirm.prompt: a beholder and seer exchanging a meaningful glance of mutual recognition during daylight, trust confirmed, subtle alliance

ui_extra.description: 전체 게임 UI 이미지. ComfyUI 최소 512px 이상. taisho_roman 스타일 통일.

logo_title.prompt: Taisho Roman era wide panoramic title art, ornate gothic calligraphy text ONE NIGHT in silver and gold, wolf silhouette howling at full moon integrated into the lettering, cherry blossom and thorny vine decorations, art nouveau border, dark background, vintage lithograph

expansion_base.prompt: Taisho Roman era dark fantasy village scene, full moon rising over traditional houses with wolf silhouettes on rooftops, cobblestone path with lanterns, ukiyo-e composition, art nouveau vine border, deep blue moonlight, vintage lithograph

expansion_daybreak.prompt: Taisho Roman era dramatic sunrise breaking over a dark landscape, first light revealing shadowy figures, dawn colors piercing through storm clouds, ukiyo-e cloud composition, art nouveau sunburst motifs, warm orange and cool purple, vintage lithograph

expansion_bonus1.prompt: Taisho Roman era mystical royal chamber, golden crown on velvet cushion with cursed aura, magical starlight through stained glass, ukiyo-e light composition, art nouveau ornamental pillars, gold and deep purple, vintage lithograph

expansion_bonus2.prompt: Taisho Roman era shadowy medieval armory, wolf banners with knight armor on display, mysterious glowing eyes in dark corners, ukiyo-e shadow composition, art nouveau weapon motifs, dark steel blue and crimson, vintage lithograph

btn_play.prompt: Taisho Roman era wide cinematic banner, moonlit village square at midnight with glowing play arrow symbol in center, ukiyo-e mist, art nouveau decorative border, dramatic call to action atmosphere, stars and cherry blossoms, vintage lithograph

bg_m_home.prompt: Taisho Roman era vertical composition, lone wolf silhouette howling atop a gothic clock tower against an oversized full moon, cherry blossom petals drifting upward, dark village rooftops stretching below, ukiyo-e mist layers, art nouveau ornamental frame, deep midnight blue and silver, vintage lithograph

bg_m_setup.prompt: Taisho Roman era vertical composition, candlelit round table viewed from above with scattered face-down tarot-style cards and a glowing map of a village, cloaked hands reaching toward the center, ukiyo-e top-down perspective, art nouveau circular border, warm amber and deep shadow, vintage lithograph

bg_m_join.prompt: Taisho Roman era vertical composition, a massive ornate wooden door slightly ajar with golden light spilling through the crack, a hand reaching for the iron knocker shaped like a wolf head, cobblestone path with fallen cherry blossoms, ukiyo-e dramatic lighting, art nouveau archway, deep brown and warm gold, vintage lithograph

bg_m_night.prompt: Taisho Roman era vertical composition, mysterious moonlit bedroom with a sleeping villager, ghostly translucent wolf shadow looming over, clock showing midnight, cherry blossom branches visible through a traditional window, ukiyo-e supernatural atmosphere, art nouveau frame, deep indigo and pale moonlight silver, vintage lithograph

bg_m_day.prompt: Taisho Roman era vertical composition, sunlit village square with villagers gathered in a tense circle pointing accusatory fingers, dramatic morning light casting long shadows, cherry blossom tree in center, ukiyo-e composition with radial focus, art nouveau sunburst border, warm golden amber and soft rose, vintage lithograph

bg_m_vote.prompt: Taisho Roman era vertical composition, dramatic torchlit tribunal scene, accused figure standing in a spotlight surrounded by shadowy hooded villagers holding voting stones, flames reflecting upward, ukiyo-e dramatic chiaroscuro, art nouveau gothic arch frame, fiery orange and deep crimson shadow, vintage lithograph

bg_m_lobby.prompt: Taisho Roman era vertical composition, atmospheric waiting hall with cloaked figures seated along stone benches in candlelight, weapons and role tokens displayed on a central pedestal, stained glass window above casting colored light, ukiyo-e composition, art nouveau pillar frame, warm amber and cool stone gray, vintage lithograph

rules_illustrations.description: 게임 규칙 페이지용 삽화 + 배너. 각 규칙 페이지 상단 배너 + 중간 삽화.

banner_game_overview.prompt: a grand panoramic view of a mysterious medieval village at twilight, villagers gathering in the town square around a large table with face-down cards, full moon rising behind gothic rooftops, an air of mystery and anticipation, first glimpse of the werewolf game world

overview_factions.prompt: three distinct groups facing each other in a triangular standoff, blue-lit villagers on the left, red-lit wolves on the right, and a lone amber-lit tanner figure in the center, faction tension visualization, dramatic triangle composition

overview_appeal.prompt: a lively group of friends around a table laughing and pointing at each other with cards face-down, warm tavern atmosphere, the joy of social deduction game, candlelight and camaraderie

banner_game_setup.prompt: a wide view of a wooden table being prepared for the game, hands dealing out face-down cards in a circle with three extra cards placed in the center, app screen glowing nearby, methodical ritual of game preparation

setup_cards.prompt: close-up of face-down cards being arranged on a dark wooden table, player count plus three center cards neatly aligned, each card with ornate wolf-and-moon back design, careful placement ritual

setup_app.prompt: a glowing phone screen displaying the narration app interface placed at the center of the game table, players seated around watching the screen, technology meets ancient game, modern ritual

banner_night_phase.prompt: a wide cinematic scene of sleeping villagers with one figure secretly opening their eyes in the darkness, moonlight streaming through a window, the critical moment when night actions begin, eerie silence

night_wake.prompt: a sequence showing different role figures waking up one by one in order, each illuminated by their own colored aura, seer in purple, robber in red, troublemaker in orange, sequential night action visualization

night_action.prompt: hands reaching across a dark table to peek at or swap face-down cards, dramatic close-up, fingers hovering over card edges, the physical mechanics of night actions, tense fingertip decisions

banner_day_phase.prompt: a wide cinematic scene of heated village debate at dawn, villagers standing in a circle arguing and pointing fingers at each other, golden sunrise light, dramatic accusations and defenses, the chaos of day phase discussion

day_debate.prompt: two players facing each other in an intense verbal duel, speech bubbles and question marks floating around, other players watching and judging, cross-examination moment, spotlight on confrontation

day_vote.prompt: all players simultaneously pointing at their chosen target in a dramatic countdown moment, fingers frozen mid-point, the decisive voting instant, radial composition with all hands converging to center

banner_victory.prompt: a dramatic split-screen scene, left side showing victorious sunrise with villagers celebrating, right side showing dark moonlit wolves howling in triumph, the duality of possible outcomes, victory and defeat

victory_village.prompt: a wolf being unmasked and revealed to shocked villagers, the moment of truth when the werewolf card is flipped face-up, dramatic reveal with light burst, village team victory condition

victory_wolf.prompt: wolves in human clothing sitting smugly among confused villagers as an innocent player is wrongly executed, dark satisfaction, wolf team victory by misdirection

banner_special_rules.prompt: a wide mysterious scene of edge-case situations, a mirror reflecting a different face (doppelganger), a lone wolf peeking at center cards, and cards shifting positions, visual chaos of special rule interactions

special_doppelganger.prompt: a figure looking into a mirror and seeing a completely different role reflected back, with a timeline arrow showing when the copied action happens, doppelganger timing visualization, identity metamorphosis

special_no_wolf.prompt: three center cards face-down with wolf eyes peeking from two of them, all player positions empty of wolves, the rare no-werewolf scenario, question marks floating above confused villagers
